tests.title: Basic token exchange (impersonation) returns the issued token trio
tests.given: A valid subject_token and subject_token_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:token-type:access_token with client credentials for the token endpoint
tests.when: TokenExchange is called with only the subject token (impersonation) and the request is POSTed as application/x-www-form-urlencoded
tests.then: The request body carries grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:token-exchange plus subject_token and subject_token_type, and the HTTP 200 response is parsed into access_token, issued_token_type, token_type, and expires_in

tests.title: Delegation exchange sends subject and actor tokens
tests.given: A valid subject_token with subject_token_type and a valid actor_token with actor_token_type
tests.when: TokenExchange is called for a delegation flow (subject plus actor)
tests.then: The request body includes subject_token, subject_token_type, actor_token, and actor_token_type; the issued token represents the delegation relationship and MAY contain an act claim (RFC 8693 §4.1)

tests.title: All six token type URIs are serialized verbatim
tests.given: Each of the six RFC 8693 §3 token type URIs (access_token, refresh_token, id_token, saml1, saml2, jwt)
tests.when: Each URI is used as subject_token_type in a token exchange request
tests.then: The library serializes the full URI string in the request body without modification or abbreviation

tests.title: requested_token_type and audience parameters are included
tests.given: requested_token_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:token-type:access_token and audience=https://api.example.com alongside the subject token
tests.when: TokenExchange is called with the requested token type and audience configured
tests.then: Both parameters are sent in the request body; the issued_token_type in the response MAY differ from the requested_token_type

tests.title: Successful exchange response fields are parsed, including token_type N_A
tests.given: A successful token exchange HTTP 200 response, including responses whose token_type is N_A for non-bearer issued tokens
tests.then: access_token (string), issued_token_type (URI string), token_type (string, e.g. Bearer or N_A), and the optional expires_in (integer), scope (string), and refresh_token (string) are extracted; token_type=N_A is accepted without error

tests.title: Error response is surfaced as a typed OAuth error
tests.given: An exchange request the server rejects (invalid subject_token, unauthorized client, or unsupported grant type)
tests.when: The endpoint replies HTTP 400 with a standard OAuth error body (error=invalid_grant or error=invalid_request)
tests.then: A typed token error carrying the error code plus optional error_description and error_uri (and the HTTP status) is surfaced
